parsed_artifacts.content: {"ip":"timer","packet_id":"module__timer__equivalence","todo_plan_sha256":"53834821b27363b8d16e5991dc812b9380099860db84ca19bd61cb5db03fa76e","owner_module":"timer","owner_file":"rtl/timer.sv","source_ref":"sub_modules.timer.module_equivalence","top_module":"timer","ssot":"timer/yaml/timer.ssot.yaml","implemented_contract":{"role":"wiring-only top-level APB timer integration module","ports":["pclk","presetn","paddr","psel","penable","pwrite","pwdata","prdata","pready","pslverr","irq"],"child_instances":[{"module":"timer_regs","instance":"u_timer_regs","purpose":"APB decode, LOAD/CTRL storage, STATUS read mux, pready, pslverr"},{"module":"timer_core","instance":"u_timer_core","purpose":"count_q decrement/reload and one-cycle irq pulse"}],"equivalence_boundary_observations":["prdata","pready","pslverr","irq","load_q","enable_q","count_q"],"functional_model_alignment":"Top boundary decodes APB access intent and wires live child RTL outputs/state so module-level scoreboard observations can be compared with FunctionalModel.apply without copying FL expected data."},"pass_allowed":false,"ssot_tbd_report":"none"}

Packet module__timer__equivalence authored rtl/timer.sv as the SSOT wiring-only top. The module preserves the APB top IO contract, instantiates timer_regs and timer_core through the machine-readable integration.connections rows, and exposes real RTL boundary behavior for module equivalence observations: prdata, pready, pslverr, irq, load_q, enable_q, and count_q. PASS is not claimed because tool evidence and other packets remain open.
